synopsis: The third chapter of the pentalogy (3 Movies + 2 OVAs). A retelling of Kenshiro's final battle with Raoh. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Super Robot Wars OG: The Inspector
titleRomaji: Super Robot Taisen OG: The Inspector
titleEnglish: Super Robot Wars OG: The Inspector
titleNative: スーパーロボット大戦OG -ジ・インスペクター-
synonyms: Super Robot Taisen Original Generation: The Inspector
synopsis: With many of its central personnel lost in the war, the Earth Federation Government is forced to rebuild, and Brian Midcrid, president of the Unified Colonies, takes the position of its president. During an emergency session of the Federation Diet, he publicly acknowledges the existence of extraterrestials, and reveals the events of the L5 campaign to the masses in what will later come to be called the "Tokyo Declaration". He goes on to state that these aliens pose a serious threat to humanity. (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: LUPIN THE 3rd vs. CAT’S EYE
titleNative: ルパン三世VSキャッツ・アイ
synonyms: ルパン三世 VS. キャッツ♥アイ
Lupin III vs Occhi di Gatto
synopsis: Hitomi, Rui, and Ai are sisters and cat burglars. They steal a painting from a museum around the same time Lupin the 3rd appears to steal another painting himself. Both paintings are part of Michael Heinz’s series titled the Girl and the Flowers. To the girls, the paintings are clues for their missing father's whereabouts. When they learn Lupin is after the same target, a fire lights inside them. (Source: Amazon Prime Video) Note: A collab animation to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the Lupin III anime and the 40th anniversary of Cat's Eye .

title: Saber Marionette J Again
titleNative: またまたセイバーマリオネットＪ
synopsis: Lime, Cherry, and Bloodberry, female-like androids called marionettes, have returned to Otaru`s side. The somewhat reformed marionettes of Faust (Tiger, Luchs, and Panther) are sent to stay with Otaru and friends to learn more about being human. Enter a seventh marionette named Marine, who has a mysterious power -- and they all possess the special maiden circuit that allows a marionette to feel emotions! (Source: AniDB)

title: Lupin the 3rd: The Columbus Files
titleRomaji: Lupin III: Ai no Da Capo - Fujiko's Unlucky Days
titleNative: ルパン三世『愛のダ・カーポ ～Fujiko's Unlucky Days』
synonyms: Lupin III - L'amore da capo: Fujiko's Unlucky Days
synopsis: When Fujiko secures a file that documents the location of the fabled Columbus Egg– a mystical relic found by Christopher Columbus which can be harnessed to control the weather– she quickly recruits Lupin and the gang to track down the long-lost treasure. To prevent a sinister villain from finding the Egg, Fujiko memorizes the file and destroys it. Unfortunately, in the process, she contracts amnesia, changing her personality and wiping her memory of Lupin and his friends almost entirely. Can they restore Fujiko back to normal before the Egg falls into the hands of a madman? (Source: Discotek Media)

title: Cardfight!! Vanguard will+Dress
titleNative: カードファイト!! ヴァンガード will+Dress
synopsis: The sequel to Cardfight!! Vanguard: overDress . Four months after the battle at Nagoya Castle, Yu-yu and friends received an invitation to a tournament. That "Deluxe" tournament aims to determine the strongest fighter, bringing together both "Front Fighters" who are active in official tournaments, and hidden powerhouse "Counter Fighters" like "Blackout" that compete against each other for flags. The existing characters from overDress will be competing with new characters from will+Dress such as Raika, Michiru, and Urara, to become the strongest of them all! (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: Katana Maidens ~ Tomoshibi
titleRomaji: Toji no Miko: Kizamishi Issen no Tomoshibi
titleNative: 刀使ノ巫女 刻みし一閃の燈火
synonyms: Katana Maidens ~ Toji No Miko OVA
synopsis: Since ancient times, shrine maidens who wield swords have been exorcising "aratama," strange existences that threaten the human world. These young women who wear school uniforms and a sword are called "Toji," and they serve as an official unit within the police force as a "special religious service police squad." The government authorizes the Toji to wear swords and serve as government officials, and the government has set up five schools throughout the country for the girls to attend. In the spring, the five schools send their best Toji to compete in a tournament. As the tournament comes closer, all of the representatives rigorously train themselves in order to get stronger and improve their skills.

title: Arknights Animation PVs
titleNative: アークナイツ アニメPVs
synopsis: Assorted commercials for the mobile game Arknights. These short animations aired on TV and were posted to Arknights YouTube channel, while additionally shared via Twitter, advertising the game and associated events after its Japan launch. The list of the commercials are as follows (note that CMs without animation are not present and, for the ones with long and short versions, the longer version is taken into consideration) 1) Official Animation Trailer (アニメPV) [7 January 2020] 2) Grani and the Knights’ Treasure (騎兵と狩人) [30 January 2020] 3) EP05 Necessary Solutions (第五章「快刀乱麻」) [5 March 2020] 4) Operational Intelligence (戦地の逸話) [25 March 2020] 5) Heart of Surging Flame (青く燃ゆる心) [21 April 2020] 6) Code of Brawl (喧騒の掟) [25 May 2020] 7) Partial Necrosis (第六章「局部壊死」) [22 June 2020] 8) Ancient Forge (洪炉示歳（エンシェントフォージ）) [22 July 2020] 9) Stories of Afternoon (午後の逸話) [25 August 2020] 10) Children of Ursus (ウルサスの子供たち) [25 September 2020] 11) Twilight of Wolumonde (ウォルモンドの薄暮) [22 October 2020] 12)

title: Ling Cage
synopsis: In the not-too-distant future, the human world has long been overpopulated. Humanity marched to the stars in search of a new home, and just as this was going on, the moon's alignment caused massive earthquakes to ripple across the world, lasting several decades. Humanity was demolished. When the land finally recovered, humanity reemerged to face this strange yet familiar world. Will we, who once lorded over this domain, still remain the masters of this world? (Source: BiliBili)

title: Reign: The Conqueror
synopsis: Prince Alexander, son of King Philip, and heir to the Macedonian empire, must fend off political saboteurs, assassins, and the jealousy of his own father to ascend to the position of king. Once there, he begins his quest to conquer all nations and become known as the Great King, though an ancient prophecy foretells that he will be the destroyer of the world and forever remembered as the Devil King. (Source: Anime News Network)
